title: Bureaucrat's Triumph
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
A military [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]], '''''Bureaucrat's Triumph''''' was the central component of [[Algara II]]'s planetary defense force, aided only by a squadron of [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1992-06-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Two]]''
*<!-- 1994-11-XX -->''[[The Star Wars Planets Collection]]''
